query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS template_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresa_id INT NOT NULL,
  version_number INT NOT NULL,
  logo_url TEXT,
  logo_key TEXT,
  cor_primaria VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL,
  cor_secundaria VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL,
  incluir_pestel TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_swot TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_okr TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_bsc TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_graficos TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_recomendacoes TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  rodape_personalizado TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_by VARCHAR(255),
  INDEX idx_empresa_version (empresa_id, version_number)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS template_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresa_id INT NOT NULL,
  version_number INT NOT NULL,
  logo_url TEXT,
  logo_key TEXT,
  cor_primaria VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL,
  cor_secundaria VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL,
  incluir_pestel TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_swot TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_okr TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_bsc TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_graficos TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  incluir_recomendacoes TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  rodape_personalizado TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_by VARCHAR(255),
  INDEX idx_empresa_version (empresa_id, version_number)
)
